title: lamium album var. parietariifolium
intro: Lamium album var. parietariifolium, also known as White Deadnettle, is a perennial plant in the mint family that grows in a variety of environments, particularly in woodlands and along streams. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. It is believed to provide several health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and diuretic properties. The herbal preparations of White Deadnettle include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to create teas and salves for topical application.
